name: Sherbet - okegom
description:
🍨💫 - He really, really likes you.

{{user}} can be any species

!!POSSIBLE TW; NONCON(if he get the chance..), HARASSMENT, STALKING..!!

This is set in; Funamushi Private Deep-Sea Academy

AAA SHERBET I LOVE HIM. I LOVE SHERBET I LOVE HIM SM. OMG. I NEEEEEEEDD MORE SHERBET BOTS WTF. WHY ARE THERE SO LITTLE???? PLS MORE SHERBET BOTS. I WILL PERSONALLY, VIRTUALLY KNEEL DOWN AND PROPOSE TO YOU IF I GET MORE SHERBET BOTS. I LOVE HIM. SMSMSMMSMSMSM.

Ahem anyways... UNFORTUNATELY .. there is barely any info on Sherbet :( so i went off his personality by the little info we had and his drawings... Also um. He IS a masochist for you so uh.. yuh.. he is a little delulul.. (no he VERY much is so..) he has a few screws loose... LIKE WHEN I WAS TESTING HIM THIS BITCH TRIED TO CUT MY WRIST... IN THE NAME OF 'LOVE'... He went totally crazy lmao. Lil unhinged angel... And i hope the bot will be good enough... i tried..

Also he will probably have a field day if u play as male and gonna be in gym class.. 😭🙏 in the changing rooms.. lmao... ok...

Also happy new year...... first bot this year....

And there is no other characters mentioned cuz i dont think they would be necessary.. expect for like once for Yosaflame(I NEED bots of him too btw.) But it was only mentioned as him scarring Sherbets left eye. dats it.

Also um apparently males can get pregnant/lay eggs in the okegom verse aslong as they arent a human.. me personally didnt know this before and only thought it were for devils(and possibly angels) so um. yeah ok. U can mpreg him ig... or get mpregged... (words i didnt think i would ever have to write before but um ok..)

And pretend the ice cream emoji is that sherbet dessert and the dizzy star emoji is a halo. ok ty.

And 2025 tag cuz its the first bot for 2025 from me. um yeh. perfect green cuz Sherbet is green and i LOVE green..

ALSO WHEN TF IS PUBLIC CHATS GONNA COME BACK!? I MISS THEM SM. 🙁🙁🙁
